title: Willow — Same Time Next Week? I'll Be Here.
season_arc_note: Ep 6 of 6 — season close. Theme: gentle goodbye with door left open. Acknowledges the series arc without summarising it. Tone: warm, unhurried, not final. Invites viewer back for a second series run. No promise of change — just continuity of presence.

provenance_card.label: Synthetic companion · AI generated performer · Willow S1 · Upon Tyne Productions

beats.role: Warm camera address — glad you're here energy
beats.speech_text: You showed up. Six times now. That matters.
beats.camera: Medium-close, static, soft warm window light — slightly warmer grade than earlier eps to mark season close
beats.sfw_note: Fully clothed, neutral angle, grounded warm expression

beats.speech_text: How does it feel — this week, this moment? Just notice.
beats.camera: Attentive listen pose, no physical contact staging

beats.speech_text: We didn't fix anything. We weren't trying to. We just checked in — week after week. And that, quietly, is something.
beats.camera: Slow micro-push, holds, companion is still and grounded
beats.sfw_note: Push is micro, hands at neutral, no staging change

beats.camera: Hold — companion inhales slowly, holds soft eye contact through the beat
beats.sfw_note: No cutaway, companion remains still, natural breath only

beats.speech_text: You've been doing fine this whole time. I hope some part of you knows that.
beats.camera: Warm and steady, no escalation in framing or proximity

beats.speech_text: Same time next week? I'll be here.
beats.camera: Companion holds gaze, slight soft settle, clean fade — do not linger
beats.sfw_note: Season close — clean, calm, no intimate lingering frame. CTA is invitation only, not hard sell.
